title: Senior Financial Analyst - LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
